schema_version.description: Wire version for the standard Topic 3 error receipt.
schema_version.title: Schema Version

error_code.description: Stable machine-readable error code from the shared error catalog.
error_code.title: Error Code

category.description: Error ownership category such as CONTRACT, PROVIDER, or TIMEOUT.
category.title: Category

severity.description: Operational severity; it does not encode academic correctness.

retriable.description: Whether infrastructure policy permits another delivery attempt.
retriable.title: Retriable

safe_message.description: Redacted message safe for logs and authorized clients.
safe_message.title: Safe Message

details_ref.description: Restricted artifact reference for diagnostics; never raw secrets.
details_ref.title: Details Ref

occurred_at.description: UTC time at which the error occurred.
occurred_at.title: Occurred At
